title: cerastium holosteoides var. angustifolium
intro: Cerastium holosteoides var. angustifolium is a lesser-known variety of the annual or biennial plant Cerastium holosteoides, commonly known as the snow-in-summer. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and immune system support. In herbal preparations, Cerastium holosteoides var. angustifolium is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
